steps.title: Locate the direct detail
steps.content: The question asks what the narrator and Diego did in the car. The passage states directly that they played games to see how many license plates they could spot.

steps.title: Remove unsupported actions
steps.content: A is wrong because the text never says they read books. B is wrong because it never says they sang. C is wrong because it never says they slept. The only supported action is the one stated in the first sentence. The answer is D.
